global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent headline and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a product at a specific price with a call to action.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A dark gray background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring two overlapping rectangles with rounded corners, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your next favorite pick' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: A smaller white text showing the price '€29.99' below the headline.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with the text 'Get offer' in bold, centered at the bottom.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Two small circles positioned to the left of the price text, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangle shape located below the price text, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangle shape positioned above the price text, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: Another small rectangle shape located near the bottom of the ad, contributing to the layout.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small circle shape positioned near the bottom left, adding to the overall design.

elements.label: Shipping information
elements.description: A smaller white text stating 'shipping over $25' located below the price text.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick €29.99 Get offer
